title: Rice Girl
writer: Aldo De Benedetti, Ennio De Concini, Carlo Musso
actors: Elsa Martinelli, Folco Lulli, Michel Auclair
plot: A young girl hires herself for a low salary in order to snare herself in the rice fields. By the way, the landlord is also her unknown father, of whom she should know nothing. He stands by her paternal as she gets into trouble.
